steps.title: Track hypothesis and result
steps.content: The text starts with a long-standing hypothesis that Clovis-point spears helped drive mammoth extinction. It then describes an experiment whose projectiles barely penetrated the clay, leading the anthropologist to doubt that explanation.

steps.title: Reject narrower purposes
steps.content: A mentions an ongoing debate that the text does not describe. B focuses on pros and cons of the method, but the passage emphasizes results. C claims there are two competing hypotheses, though only one is tested. The purpose is to describe an experiment that weakens an established view. The answer is D.
